Interface ProgramModelElement

All Superinterfaces:
ModelElement, NamedModelElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ArrayType, ClassType, ClassTypeContainer, Constructor, Field, Member, Method, Type, Variable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ArrayDeclaration, ClassDeclaration, ConstructorDeclaration, DefaultConstructor, EnumClassDeclaration, FieldSpecification, ImplicitFieldSpecification, InterfaceDeclaration, KeYJavaType, MethodDeclaration, NullType, Package, PrimitiveType, SuperArrayDeclaration, TypeDeclaration, VariableSpecification
public interface ProgramModelElement extends NamedModelElement
An entity of the program meta model.
